Name: FAnimSegment
Description: this is anim segment that defines what animation and how

Variables.Name: AnimReference
Variables.Description: Anim Reference to play - only allow AnimSequence or AnimComposite

Variables.Name: AnimStartTime
Variables.Description: Time to start playing AnimSequence at.

Variables.Name: AnimEndTime
Variables.Description: Time to end playing the AnimSequence at.

Variables.Name: AnimPlayRate
Variables.Description: Playback speed of this animation. If you'd like to reverse, set -1
